edgeCases: completion emits directive text only — no push/merge side effects (read-only HasOriginRemote)
deliver requires an explicit --via (Cobra MarkFlagRequired); --via with an unknown value errors 'choose --via pr|merge'
HasOriginRemote error treated as no-origin in complete — never blocks completion
pr-via with no origin refuses with a clear error and never pushes
pr-via with gh absent still pushes, prints honest manual-PR instructions, returns non-zero, never claims a PR was opened
merge-via composes runMerge unchanged (clean removes worktree; conflict reuses merge-steward dispatch + --continue)
